name: Nintendo
description: A being that has existed since 1889, originally selling playing cards before evolving into its final form: a corporation that prints money by making you buy the same Zelda game for the fifth time. It sues anyone who looks at it funny, region-locks its soul, and charges $80 for a game that came out in 2017. Its natural predator is the Steam Sale.

moves.name: ⚖️ DMCA Strike
moves.desc: Nintendad's lawyers materialize from thin air and strike the opponent down. Deals massive damage and confuses them as their YouTube channel gets taken down mid-battle.

moves.name: 👨‍🔧 It's-a Me
moves.desc: Summons Mario, who jumps on the opponent's head. Classic. Effective. Nobody can stop it. Nintendo has been doing this since 1985 and will never stop.

moves.name: 🙏 Please Understand
moves.desc: Channels Iwata's spirit. Says 'Please Understand' before doing something absolutely unhinged to the opponent's speed stat. We miss him.

moves.name: 📺 Nintendo Direct
moves.desc: A Nintendo Direct drops at 6am with no warning. Nintendad's ATK sharply rises from the sheer chaos of fan reactions. Chat is going insane.

moves.name: 🔒 Region Lock
moves.desc: Traps the opponent in a region they can't escape from. Lowers defense as they realize their imported copy doesn't work.

moves.name: 🏦 Nintendo Bank is Closed
moves.desc: Shuts down an entire online service with 30 days notice. The opponent is poisoned by grief AND confused trying to back up their save data before it's gone forever. RIP.
